_regression.source: real map: Akagahara shipped with field_fall=1440 while build_comb's plots stopped ~180px higher, leaving a 181px PHANTOM TAIL on the field envelope. The tail is invisible on the render but real to every distance test, so the dispersed ring-placement and all_houses_field_adjacent BOTH measured to empty ground and passed a line of farmsteads stranded south of the rice (GM: 'there are still 3 farmhouses south of the paddies'). Note all_houses_field_adjacent PASSES on this manifest - that blindness is exactly why field_outline_matches_planting exists. Fixed by sizing field_fall (1260) to what the comb actually fills, NOT by nudging the farms.
